agents.name: Explorer Agent
agents.role: Surfaces the relevant staging and gold models for the reliability question. Starts from the CRO's part-removal problem, not the file tree.
agents.sample_input: Find the models in this project related to in-service removal rate, flight-control servo, route corridor, Pacific fleet, salt-air exposure, and supplier gasket.
responsibilities: Runs status to confirm the dbt project is parsed and healthy
Runs search with reliability vocabulary against model names, columns, and descriptions
Hands the candidate model list to Summary

agents.name: Summary Agent
agents.role: Explains the grain of each upstream, the join keys, and where the analytical gap is. Decides before any SQL whether the data can answer the question at all.
agents.sample_input: For those models, show the grain, key columns, and how they join. Where does the gap sit between what we have and what the CRO asked for?
responsibilities: Runs describe on each candidate model to confirm grain
Runs lineage to validate the join path including the part dim supplier-switch column
Names the new grain the gold table has to land on

agents.name: Worker Agent
agents.role: Does file edits and model generation. Authors the new gold.fct_removal_by_part_route_corridor_60d with the right CTE structure, joins, and final select.
agents.sample_input: Create gold.fct_removal_by_part_route_corridor_60d as a table materialization. Validate the proposed grain with a deterministic dbt_show slice before committing the file.
responsibilities: Runs warehouse and dbt_show on a targeted 60-day slice to validate proposed grain
Writes the SQL file with header comments, CTEs, joins, and final aggregation including the gasket vendor correlation
Materializes the model to the gold schema on Iceberg

agents.name: Verification Agent
agents.role: Adds dbt tests, schema contract, and ownership. Validates against existing lineage and confirms downstream consumers — airworthiness dashboards and CAMO feeds — can read the new asset.
agents.sample_input: Add tests covering uniqueness on (part_number, route_corridor, removal_date) and not-null on removal_rate_per_1000_cycles. Confirm lineage updates pick the new gold table up immediately.
responsibilities: Writes the YAML companion with description, tests, and schema contract
Confirms uniqueness and not-null tests pass against the materialized slice
Updates lineage so downstream consumers — airworthiness dashboards and CAMO feeds — pick the asset up immediately
